raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX chat with the airline company, I need to cancel the flight due to medical reason, affecting both me and my partner. I contacted XXXX XXXX and was told the booking would be converted into a future flight credit. After they cancel it, I asked where to see the credit and how to use it, she then say need to pay {$150.00} to use it.

I was never informed that a {$150.00} fee would be required to use the credit. That information was not disclosed before they canceled the flight.

To date, I have not received any confirmation or visibility of the credit-no credit email, and nothing showing in my XXXX  account .

On the same day I filled dispute with citi credit card by phone, they asked me to wait or contacted for more information as needed. On XX/XX/XXXX I found out its closed but I never get contacted with more information or anything. I reopened the dispute on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, citi said they can not reopen it because it will be declined the below is the email I sent on XX/XX/XXXX Dear Citi Disputes Team, I am writing to follow up on a chargeback dispute that I filed by phone regarding a flight purchase with XXXX XXXX. I recently reviewed my statement and was surprised to see a reversal of the dispute decision, even though I never received any update or explanation.

Here are the details of my situation : I contacted XXXX XXXX about I need to cancel the flight due to medical reason, affecting both me and my partner. I contacted XXXX XXXX and was told the booking would be converted into a future flight credit.

I was never informed that a {$150.00} fee would be required to use the credit. That information was not disclosed before they canceled the flight.

To date, I have not received any confirmation or visibility of the credit-no credit email, and nothing showing in my XXXX account .

Importantly, I have not received a refund, nor have I been able to use any alternative value for the original purchase.

Therefore, I am very dissatisfied that I did not receive the service I paid for. There is No refund and no future credit. Did not mention I need to pay {$150.00}, before they canceled it.

No refund with the undisclosed fee, and the fact that the service ( flight ) was canceled. The merchant has not fulfilled their obligation, and I should not be responsible for a service I did not receive.
